evidence: Read full file and diff. Defaults now remove writable docker-compose.yml/start/update and raw env readable globs while keeping compose and scripts readable. No new trust-boundary weakening found.
Read full file and diff. Default readable/writable policy separation reduces compose/script/env exposure. Explicit custom config remains operator-controlled as documented threat-model input.

Read full file and supporting src/containers.js. logs() and inspect() now use listProjectContainers() plus assertKnownContainer() before docker logs/inspect. Existing service/container validation remains for mutations.

Read full file and supporting src/pathPolicy.js/src/fileOps.js. readEnv/setEnvVar now resolve project paths, enforce realpath containment, validate env key grammar, and reject CR/LF values before interpolation.

Read full file and supporting src/pathPolicy.js. Raw disclosure binaries removed from EXEC_BINARIES; runScript now refuses scripts writable through active MCP write policy. curl/wget remain accepted diagnostic risk per source report.

Read full file and diff. Initial realpath helper had a dangling-symlink ENOENT bypass for allowMissingLeaf writes; candidate CAND-DIFF-001 was opened and fixed. Final code lstat-checks ENOENT paths and rejects dangling symlinks before write sinks.
Read full file. logs and inspect handlers now pass configured cwd into Docker helpers; no tool handler bypass of the new project-container validation found.
